title: A notion of fractional slice monogenic functions with respect to a pair of real valued functions
summary: This work presents the basic elements and results of a Clifford algebra valued fractional slice monogenic functions theory defined from the null-solutions of a suitably fractional Cauchy-Riemann operator in the Riemann-Liouville and Caputo sense with respect to a pair of real valued functions on certain domains of Euclidean spaces.
